behaviors.description: The evaluate-stage command stores grounding into a dedicated `grounding` artifact, not the `plan` artifact.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is evaluate-stage orchestration plus artifact-store wiring (module handoff), not pure local logic. Unit could miss wrong slot mapping at the command->artifact layer. Rejected System: behavior text is about artifact key selection, not OS/network/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: correctness here is storage target, not model-output quality or multi-agentic decision sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Invoke evaluate-stage with a real in-process artifact store and run context; assert a `grounding` artifact is created/updated and `plan` is untouched by this stage.

behaviors.description: The implement-stage flow reads grounding when available and still writes its execution output to `plan`.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module read/write behavior (implement flow + artifact retrieval + artifact write). Unit is likely too low because real failure appears at handoff between readers/writers. Rejected System: no real OS/network/subprocess requirement in behavior text. Rejected Agentic: behavior validates artifact routing (read `grounding`, write `plan`), not LLM judgment quality.
behaviors.test_description: Seed run context with a `grounding` artifact, execute implement flow with deterministic model stub, and assert implement consumed grounding input path while output artifact is written to `plan`.

behaviors.description: Deep-dive no longer overwrites `plan` as a redundant side effect when diagnosis already exists in issue content.
behaviors.justification: Failure appears when deep-dive logic interacts with issue-content diagnosis detection and artifact persistence side effects. Rejected System: no OS/network/subprocess boundary described. Rejected Agentic: behavior is suppression of an unnecessary write side effect when diagnosis exists, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Provide issue content that already contains diagnosis, run deep-dive stage through its normal module wiring, and assert no write occurs to `plan` (or prior `plan` value remains unchanged).

behaviors.description: Artifact lineage is preserved so implement can read the `grounding` artifact produced earlier in the same run context.
behaviors.justification: Core risk is state handoff across modules via run-context lineage. Unit on one function can miss lineage/key propagation bugs. Rejected System: lineage is in-process context/storage behavior. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: behavior text requires availability/propagation of artifact, not validating model decision quality across steps.
behaviors.test_description: Within one run context, execute evaluate-stage to write `grounding`, then execute implement-stage and assert it resolves the same lineage artifact identity/value.

behaviors.description: In a full multi-step agent run (`deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`), the final implementation plan reflects grounding produced earlier in the run.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a full multi-step agent chain and end-result dependence on earlier grounding through sequential stages. This crosses multiple agentic decisions and handoffs, so Workflow is the real failure boundary. Rejected lower levels: Integration/Agentic alone would not validate full chained propagation and final-plan reflection across the entire run sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real end-to-end chain (`deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`) in one run context with representative input; assert final implementation plan incorporates grounding artifacts produced upstream and survives stage transitions.

behaviors.description: When grounding is absent, implement falls back safely and still emits a valid plan artifact without corrupting other stored artifacts.
behaviors.justification: This is fallback-path orchestration across artifact lookup, default behavior, and artifact persistence integrity. Unit may miss corruption/overwrite interactions in store wiring. Rejected System: no real OS/network/subprocess requirement. Rejected Agentic: this validates safe fallback and artifact integrity, not quality of model-generated content.
behaviors.test_description: Execute implement-stage in a run context with no `grounding` artifact and pre-existing unrelated artifacts; assert a valid `plan` is emitted and unrelated artifacts remain unchanged.
